title: Quadratics and Inequalities
description: Solve quadratic equations by factorising, completing the square and the quadratic formula, use the discriminant to classify roots, sketch quadratic graphs, and solve quadratic and linear-quadratic simultaneous inequalities and equations.
objectives: Solve quadratic equations by factorising, completing the square, and using the quadratic formula
Use the discriminant b^2 - 4ac to determine the number and nature of the roots of a quadratic
Sketch quadratic graphs from factorised or completed-square form, identifying roots, turning point and intercepts
Solve quadratic inequalities and express the solution set correctly using inequality notation
Solve simultaneous equations where one equation is linear and the other quadratic

lessons.title: The discriminant and sketching quadratic graphs
Quadratic inequalities and linear-quadratic simultaneous equations
